case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. LADAY, DASCHYL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LADAY, DASCHYL $1,435.10 PRINCIPAL, $98.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,533.10

JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
